name: ai-setup
description: Personal Claude Code setup mirrored from OpenCode global configuration.

plugins.name: interactive-mcp
plugins.description: Repo docs/libs and dependency MCP tools mirrored from the OpenCode custom plugin.

plugins.name: linear-orchestration
plugins.description: Linear-backed task orchestration: grill, decompose into a per-repo Linear project, dispatch worker/reviewer subagents (relayed), and drive statuses. Auto-engages via a UserPromptSubmit hook.
